docs.title: Research

docs.text:
I mainly write software in 
FORTRAN
 and 
Julia
. Most of the packages are shared on my 
GitHub
 page, 
while I also include here some useful subroutines that I have worked on.


Seismic Inversion Toolbox in Julia




Documentation


A simple Jupyter 
notebook
 that demonstrates 
full waveform inversion of seismic data.




Programming Utils




A Makefile to Automatically Compile f90 Source Files with Dependencies




Signal Processing




Construct a Minimum Phase Butter-Worth Filter in Using Log Spectra
